nasb.text: Now when it was told David, he gathered all Israel together and crossed the Jordan, and came to Helam. And the Arameans arrayed themselves to meet David and fought against him.

esv.text: And when it was told David, he gathered all Israel together and crossed the Jordan and came to Helam. The Syrians arrayed themselves against David and fought with him.

cnv.text: 有人告訴了大衛，他就聚集所有的以色列人，渡過約旦河，來到了希蘭。亞蘭人擺好了陣迎擊大衛，與他交戰。

ccb.text: 大卫听到消息后，就召集以色列全军，渡过约旦河，来到希兰。亚兰人列阵迎战大卫，
